basics.name: Michael Klein
basics.label: Cloud Platform Architect and Engineer
basics.summary: Lead Cloud Architect | GCP, AWS, Platform Engineering, CloudOps | 20+ years of experience in IT

work.name: EPO
highlights: I designed and built two Enterprise-grade GCP "tenants" incl. their foundational setup
Instead of paying €1 to Google Cloud, I make sure our actual spend is ~60 cents
I've helped to adopt GCP from 0 to > €4m p.a., saving ~50% compared to on-premises
I was directly involved in the implementation of several GCP discount agreements, e.g., with ~€270k additional saving in 2023 and ~350k in 2024
I helped to increase our overall 2024 production by 2% (~€50M)
I'm the sole developer of `cecli` - the missing `gcloud browsers` command

work.name: IDS
highlights: As Development Manager for Oracle BPA Suite, I achieved ~140% ROI in 3 years
I built up an office and a development outpost for 5 FTEs in the US
As Team Manager Web Development, I saved a 7 digit figure deal from customer drop-out
I mentored a thesis

work.name: Insiders Technologies
highlights: I developed a working prototype of a web-based search system in 6 weeks, which was demoed at the world's largest IT trade fair, CeBIT

volunteer.summary: I served the community as a volunteer firefighter for over 30 years, starting as a junior cadet and eventually becoming a state-certified incident commander and group leader. During my tenure, I participated in over 100 firefighting operations, contributing to the safety and well-being of the community. Additionally, I created and developed the organization's website, enhancing communication and outreach efforts.
highlights: I was a junior cadet between 1988 and 1990
I was a firefighter from 1990 to 2019
I became a state-certified incident commander and group leader
I was the creator and developer of the organization's website between 1998 and 2006
I participated in 100+ incidents

certificates.name: Google Cloud Certified Gen AI Leader

projects.name: Wyatt
projects.description: A location- and time-based reminder app for Android and iOS.
highlights: I implemented the app using Flutter, enabling cross-platform development
I integrated Geofencing and Google Maps

I published the article "Dynamic (and Secure) Google Maps API Key in Flutter" on Medium, sharing insights and challenges faced during the project in regards to securely handling Google Maps API keys in Flutter applications
I published the article "Geofencing in Flutter" on Medium, detailing the implementation and use cases of geofencing in the app

quotes.text: Whatever tomorrow brings, I'll be there. With open arms and open eyes.
quotes.author: Incubus, "Drive"

quotes.text: The only winning move is not to play.
quotes.author: Joshua, "WarGames"

faqs.question: Can you send me your CV/resume?
What do you expect from a recruiter?
faqs.answer: Read. The. Resume. Any questions? Please ask.

faqs.question: Why the fancy background color of https://cv.michael-klein.info/, the Saturn yellow?
faqs.answer: It's the color of the VW Beetle Yellow-Black Racer. I very much like the classic version of this particular Beetle, the 1973 1303S.
